message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting across source and test files

Consistent formatting pass touching no logic — only whitespace and
line-wrapping changes produced by `cargo fmt`:

- src/io/copy.rs: reformat chained method call in test
- src/runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs: wrap long function signatures,
  strip trailing whitespace on blank lines
- src/util/resource.rs: strip trailing whitespace
- tests/det_hash_portability.rs: expand assert_eq! to multi-line,
  strip trailing whitespace
- tests/pool_warmup_wakeup.rs: alphabetize imports, wrap signatures,
  expand struct literals, strip trailing whitespace
- tests/recovery_security.rs: expand RecoveryOrchestrator::new and
  assert! to multi-line, strip trailing whitespace
- tests/repro_storm_dead_zone.rs: expand assert! to multi-line

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
